terms_agree_prefix: I have read and agree to the
err_terms: Please accept the terms and conditions
terms_intro: Welcome to the 'Buddhimotta' mobile application! These terms outline the rules for using our mobile application. Please read them carefully before using the app.
terms_s1_body: Buddhimotta is an innovative mobile app aimed at developing self-awareness and personalized learning, especially within the Bengali community.
terms_s1_b1_body: We believe everyone should have access to tools that help them discover their unique cognitive strengths and talents.
terms_s1_b2_body: By shedding light on individual knowledge and preferences, this app helps develop effective and engaging learning strategies.
terms_s2_body: We are committed to protecting your privacy and the security of your personal information. What we collect:
terms_s2_b1: Your name (will not be shared with anyone)
terms_s2_b4: Age/gender (not for ads or third parties)
terms_s2_b5: Profession — demographic data for research purposes
terms_s3_body: We may use anonymized data from the app for research purposes. This data will not contain any personal information that can identify you.
terms_s4_body: The app is provided "as is" without any warranty. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of the app.
terms_s5_body: For questions, contact us at: trimatrix01@gmail.com
home_section_label: What would you like to do?
test_answer_all: Please answer all questions before continuing
results_disclaimer: This test is based on Howard Gardner's Theory of Multiple Intelligences. The results reflect your current preferences and tendencies, not fixed abilities. Everyone has all intelligences to varying degrees.
no_results_sub: Take the Multiple Intelligence Test to see your results here.
guest_no_profile: You are browsing as a guest. Create an account to save your profile and test results.
exit_test_body: Your progress will be lost. Are you sure you want to exit?
no_students_sub: Share your class code with students to get started.
rushed_warning: ⚠ Completed very fast ({0}) — may not have read questions
no_class_yet_sub: Your class code will appear here after your account is set up.
dashboard_coming_soon_sub: Live student results, class analytics, and more are on the way.
enter_new_class_code: Enter a new class code to switch classes.
enter_class_code_hint: Ask your teacher for the class code.
take_test_first: Complete the MI test to see your progress shared with your teacher.
classes_coming_soon_sub: Class leaderboards, shared results, and teacher feedback are coming soon.
